name: Schumann's Seafood Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil shrimp in salted water for 5 minutes; reserve the cooking liquid.
2. Clean and set aside the shrimp.
3. Cut okra into thin rounds and brown it in shortening. Do not scorch.
4. In a separate pan, make a roux using flour and shortening. Add garlic and cook until golden brown.
5. Add onion, bell pepper, celery, and parsley. Cook until transparent.
6. Incorporate tomato sauce and let simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the shrimp stock and blend well.
8. Add thyme, bay leaves, salt, and pepper. Simmer for at least 1 hour.
9. In the last 20 minutes of cooking, add shrimp, crab meat, Tabasco Sauce, Worcestershire Sauce, and okra to the pot. Cover and allow it to simmer gently for at least 1 hour.
